issues.sample: The car always turns on the slippery road warning light when I drive over 60 miles per hour and the wheels lock up. Sometimes, the ABS warning light also comes on, along with error messages saying 'Service Traction Control' and 'Service StabiliTrak'.

narrative.headline: What 2023 Chevrolet Express owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 2 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (50% of reports).
